commands.name: convert-from-plugin
commands.description:
Converts a binary Bethesda
plugin to a text based
representation

options.name: --InputPath
options.description: Required. Path to the Bethesda plugin

options.name: --OutputPath
options.description:
Required. Dedicated folder to export mod as its text
representation

options.name: --GameRelease
options.description: Game release that the plugin is related to

options.name: --PackageName
options.description:
Spriggit serialization nuget package name to use for
conversion

options.name: --PackageVersion
options.description:
Spriggit serialization nuget package version to use
for conversion

options.name: --Threads
options.description: Maximum number of threads to use

options.name: --Debug
options.description:
Set up for debug mode, including resetting nuget
caches

options.name: --ModKey
options.description:
ModKey override.  If left blank, file name will be
used

options.name: --Check
options.description:
Checks some basic correctness after serialization.
Not extensive.

options.name: --DataFolder
options.description:
Path to the data folder to look to for mod files.
(Only required for separated master games, like
Starfield)

options.name: --ErrorOnUnknown
options.description:
Whether to error on unknown fields.  Liklihood of data
loss is higher if turned off.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: convert-to-plugin
commands.description:
Converts a mod from its text
based representation to a
binary Bethesda plugin

options.name: --InputPath
options.description:
Required. Path to the Bethesda plugin folder as its
Spriggit text representation

options.name: --OutputPath
options.description:
Required. Path to export the mod as its Bethesda
plugin representation

options.name: --PackageName
options.description:
Spriggit serialization nuget package to use for
conversion.  Leave blank to auto detect

options.name: --PackageVersion
options.description:
Spriggit serialization nuget package version to use
for conversion.  Leave blank to auto detect

options.name: --Threads
options.description: Maximum number of threads to use

options.name: --Debug
options.description:
Set up for debug mode, including resetting nuget
caches

options.name: --BackupDays
options.description:
Days to keep backup plugins in the temp folder
(default 30)

options.name: --Localized
options.description:
Forces the build to be localized if true, or
unlocalized if false.  If missing, the mod's flags
will determine localization.

options.name: --DataFolder
options.description:
Path to the data folder to look to for mod files.
(Only required for separated master games, like
Starfield)

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
